app.name: GeoLapor Infrastruktur
app.tagline: Report location-based infrastructure damage with transparency.

metadata.title: GeoLapor Infrastruktur
metadata.description: A geolocation-based infrastructure reporting platform for citizens, field officers, and administrators.

actions.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.title: Help the city move faster from report to repair.
home.description: GeoLapor Infrastruktur helps citizens submit reports with photos, coordinates, and transparent progress updates.

features.locationDescription: Every report includes coordinates so verification and officer assignment can move faster.
features.evidenceDescription: Damage photos help administrators validate field conditions before assigning officers.
features.workflowDescription: Report status can be tracked from submission, verification, field work, review, to completion.

publicStats.title: Platform in Numbers
publicStats.description: Real-time statistics from reports submitted by citizens across all regions.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: From spotting damage to completed repair — four clear steps.
howItWorks.step1Description: Take a photo, pin the location, and submit your report in under 3 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Description: Administrators review your photo and coordinates, then verify or request corrections.
howItWorks.step3Description: A field officer is assigned and submits progress updates with photos until the work is done.
howItWorks.step4Description: Follow every status change on the public map — from report to completion.

categoryPreview.title: Report Categories
categoryPreview.description: Infrastructure issues are organized by category so the right team gets assigned.

mapPreview.title: Public Report Map
mapPreview.description: See verified infrastructure reports on an interactive map. Filter by status or category.

publicMap.title: Public Report Map
publicMap.description: Browse verified infrastructure reports across all regions.

list.title: Reports
list.empty: No reports match the current filters.

publicReportDetail.timelineDescription: Public status changes only. Private notes and internal review data are hidden.
publicReportDetail.noPhotos: No public evidence photos are available for this report.
publicReportDetail.notFoundDescription: This report may be private, unavailable, or removed from public visibility.
publicReportDetail.privacyNote: Only public-safe report information is shown here. Reporter identity, private comments, officer identity, and audit data are hidden.

reportCreated.title: Report submitted
reportCreated.message: Your infrastructure report has been submitted and is pending verification.

reportVerified.title: Report verified
reportVerified.message: Your infrastructure report has been verified by an administrator.

reportRejected.title: Report rejected
reportRejected.message: Your infrastructure report has been rejected. Check the rejection note for details.

reportAssigned.title: New assignment
reportAssigned.message: A new infrastructure report has been assigned to you.

reportCompleted.title: Report completed
reportCompleted.message: Your infrastructure report has been marked as completed.

categories.title: Manage Categories
categories.description: Create, edit, and deactivate infrastructure report categories.
categories.deactivateConfirm: Are you sure you want to deactivate this category? It will no longer appear as an option for new reports.

form.name: Name
form.slugHelper: Optional. Auto-generated from the name if left empty.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this infrastructure category

empty.title: No categories
empty.description: Create your first infrastructure category to get started.

delete.title: Deactivate Category
delete.description: This will deactivate the category and hide it from new report forms.

officers.title: Officers
officers.description: View active field officers. Officer management is done through the Users page.

empty.title: No officers
empty.description: No active field officers found. Assign the OFFICER role to a user in the Users management page.

users.title: Manage Users
users.description: View all users and manage roles.

empty.title: No users
empty.description: No user accounts have been created yet.

empty.title: No audit logs
empty.description: Audit log records will appear here as actions are performed.

messages.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred while loading audit logs.

validation.invalidFileType: This file type is not supported.
validation.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
